decks.notes: The main goal of this Izzet Control deck is to use a combination of spells and abilities to manipulate and control the board state, while drawing cards to maintain card advantage. Utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics, Combustion Technique, and Firebending Lesson to control the opponent's creatures, while cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent provide card draw. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Gran-Gran and Agna Qel'a to provide additional utility and control options. The mana base is designed to support a mix of red and blue spells, with Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal providing necessary color fixing.

The focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly build up a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with fast-paced creature and spell plays. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent for direct damage, alongside creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off for consistent pressure, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and finish off opponents swiftly. With a mix of card draw, removal, and evasion, this deck looks to outmaneuver opponents and land decisive blows before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures to apply pressure on the opponent while also disrupting their game plan with various control elements. It combines the speed of aggro with the disruptive nature of Dimir control, using cards like Spyglass Siren and Restless Reef to control the board while deploying threats like Gloomlake Verge and Cecil, Dark Knight. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent while maintaining control of the battlefield, allowing for a versatile playstyle that can adapt to different matchups and strategies.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand to control the board and draw into more threats, you can maintain tempo and pressure. Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional evasive threats, while Into the Flood Maw and Wild Ride offer powerful finishers. Multiversal Passage and Riverpyre Verge help fix your mana base, ensuring you can consistently cast your spells. The goal is to apply constant pressure and close out the game before your opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain a fast-paced aggressive strategy by utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes efficient creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, supported by spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the game and push for damage. The deck also includes cards for card draw and land manipulation to ensure consistency. The goal is to apply pressure early and consistently while using instants and sorceries to maintain tempo and close out the game quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive style of play, utilizing creatures with evasion abilities such as Elusive Otter and Drake Hatcher. The deck also includes a variety of low-cost spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to maintain tempo and push damage through. The inclusion of cards like Secret Identity and Stock Up provide additional ways to protect and buff your creatures, making it difficult for the opponent to stabilize. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to consistently apply pressure and close out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. With a low mana curve, the deck aims to apply pressure early and finish the game quickly. Cards like Hired Claw, Burst Lightning, and Nova Hellkite provide immediate damage, while Zhao, the Moon Slayer and Hexing Squelcher offer efficient removal options. While maintaining a strong board presence with creatures like Howlsquad Heavy and Hearthborn Battler, the deck also includes burn spells like Shock and Lightning Strike to close out games. Overall, the deck's strategy is to be fast and relentless in its attacks.

The deck focuses on using a combination of graveyard manipulation and powerful reanimation spells to overwhelm the opponent with massive creatures. By filling the graveyard with powerful creatures, the player can then bring them back to the battlefield using spells like Deadly Cover-Up and Requiting Hex. This strategy allows for a quick and explosive way to dominate the board and quickly finish off the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Duress and Archenemy's Charm also provides disruption to the opponent's game plan, giving the deck a well-rounded approach to victory.

This deck focuses on managing the game by controlling the opponent's actions through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. The deck uses cards like Spell Snare and Sear to disrupt the opponent's plans, while cards like Stock Up and Consult the Star Charts help to find key pieces of the deck. The deck also includes cards like Burst Lightning and Full Bore for additional removal and board control. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win the game with powerful late-game threats.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing a combination of powerful dragons and aggressive creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By playing strong flyers like Momo and Sarkhan, alongside removal cards like Burst Lightning and Get Lost, the deck aims to control the board and deal damage efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Clarion Conqueror and Voice of Victory also allows the deck to buff its creatures and push for victory. The mana base is optimized for consistent access to both white and red mana sources, ensuring a smooth curve of threats throughout the game.

The key concept of this Temur Aggro deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By playing powerful early threats like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider, combined with efficient removal like Burst Lightning and Sunderflock, you aim to quickly chip away at your opponent's life total. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Quantum Riddler and Starting Town to disrupt your opponent's game plan and give you an advantage. Utilizing a mix of creatures and burn spells, this deck aims to close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on fast-paced aggression and board control using a mixture of creature spells and instant removal. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and maintain board dominance through spells like Flamebraider and Roaming Throne. By utilizing a mix of red, blue, and green mana sources, the deck can quickly adapt to various board states and opponent strategies. Additionally, the deck includes powerful spells like Ill-Timed Explosion and Sear to deal with threats efficiently. Overall, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents through a combination of aggressive creatures and versatile spells.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with aggressive creatures and utilizing ramp spells to generate mana quickly. By combining efficient creatures like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo with powerful threats such as Mossborn Hydra and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provides additional utility and card advantage, allowing the deck to maintain pressure while also ensuring consistent mana production. Overall, the deck aims to utilize its aggressive nature and efficient mana base to secure victories through combat damage.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a strong board presence while utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Multiversal Passage to ramp up mana. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Gene Pollinator and Ouroboroid along with cards like Nature's Rhythm to provide additional buffs. The inclusion of powerful finishers such as Craterhoof Behemoth and Marang River Regent ensures that the deck can finish off the opponent quickly if they are unable to deal with the early threats.

The deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost spells and creatures to apply pressure on the opponent early in the game. The cards in the deck allow for a fast and aggressive playstyle, aiming to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. By utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures, spells that can disrupt the opponent's board state, and cards that pump up the power of your creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The Boros Aggro deck focuses on attacking with strong, efficient creatures like Shocking Sharpshooter and Howlsquad Heavy while using burn spells like Burst Lightning and Torch the Tower to remove blockers and finish off opponents. Dalkovan Encampment can provide additional creature tokens for added pressure. The deck aims to establish a fast board presence and overwhelm the opponent before they have time to stabilize. With a mix of creatures and burn spells, Boros Aggro looks to close out games quickly and efficiently.
